questionHtml: State a possible disadvantage of using this test for reliability.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER

The two sets of questions might not be of equal difficulty         R1

OR

It is time consuming to create two sets of questions           R1        

[1 mark]

meta.title: State a possible disadvantage of using this test for reliability.
